steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to indicate that both soundscapes are on the list. A correct answer must name both the crickets at the Yodo River and the water at Nachi Falls, and confirm that both are on the list.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Both the sound of crickets on the banks of the Yodo River and the sound of water flowing over Nachi Falls are on the list.": Explicitly names both soundscapes and states both are on the list—exactly what the goal requires. ✓
  • "The sound of water flowing over Nachi Falls is on the list.": Names only Nachi Falls; the Yodo River crickets are never mentioned. ✗
  • "The Japanese Ministry of the Environment made a list of 100 culturally significant soundscapes of Japan.": Describes the list itself but names neither soundscape. ✗
  • "Each soundscape on the list, including the sound of crickets on the banks of the Yodo River, was selected for its cultural significance to Japan.": Names only the Yodo River crickets as an example; Nachi Falls is never mentioned. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
